CheckTitle: Ensure device code flow is blocked via Conditional Access
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled Conditional Access policy blocks the device code authentication flow, which is commonly abused in phishing attacks.
Risk: Device code flow allows an attacker to phish users into authenticating on the attacker's device by presenting a legitimate Microsoft login page with a code. This bypasses traditional phishing protections.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a CA policy that blocks device code flow for all users (or all except break-glass accounts) by targeting the 'Device code flow' client app type condition.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
